text.title: clean-architecture Failure Modes
text.summary: Failure modes observed when applying the clean-architecture methodology. Each pairs symptom + root-cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Email-uniqueness check lives in the controller; cannot be reused from CLI.
antipattern.fix: Move logic to a use case; controller calls the use case.

antipattern.symptom: Domain entity inherits from SQLAlchemy declarative base.
antipattern.root-cause: Author conflated entity with persistence model.
antipattern.fix: Define a plain dataclass entity; map to SQLAlchemy in infrastructure.

antipattern.symptom: Dependency rule documented but no import-linter contract; violations accrue silently.
antipattern.fix: Add import-linter / ArchUnit contract; run on every PR.

antipattern.symptom: Application imports infrastructure for a 'temporary' DI shim.
antipattern.fix: Define the interface in domain/application; infrastructure implements; wire at composition root.
